description: Log in to Moodle (http://localhost/moodle) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). For the course "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101), add a manual grade item named "Clinical Skills Assessment" with a maximum grade of 50 and a passing grade of 30. Record the following scores in the gradebook: Jane Smith (jsmith) 45, Michael Jones (mjones) 32, Alice Wilson (awilson) 48, and Bob Brown (bbrown) 28.
